title: OCD effects
description: The plugin adds visual effects, so far there are only footprints
body:
# OCD effects

This plugin adds various visual effects to enhance your gameplay experience. Currently, it includes:

Footprints – Leaves temporary footprints behind players as they walk, adding realism and immersion.

# Configuration
You can customize the effects in the config file:

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ea2fb2e59313decfc819dfb69f81ba45d2f694a.png)

# Future Updates
More visual effects will be added in the future! If you have suggestions, feel free to share them.

## Need help or want to contribute? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/cC37UNPuaz)!
